coverage_explanation: The legal text for CN 22042233 ("Tokaj") refers to additional note 4(B)(b) to Chapter 22, which defines Tokaj as a PDO wine of fresh grapes produced in the Tokaj region (Hungary/Slovakia), presented in containers ≤ 2 L. The existing TBox already provides `eucn:TokajWine` (labelled "Tokaj Wine (CN 2204 21 23)") and `eucn:TokajPDOOriginQuality`. The restrictions placed here link TokajWine to its PDO quality and small container (≤ 2 L), which covers the geographic/PDO and container size criteria. However, the specific sub-criteria from additional note 4(B)(b) — such as the precise alcohol strength range (e.g. > 15% vol) and the total dry extract thresholds that distinguish CN 22042233 from its siblings (e.g. 22042226 for PDO ≤ 15% vol) — are not fully captured because the relevant AlcoholByVolumePercent range restriction for this specific sub-code (which corresponds to a PDO Tokaj wine with actual alcoholic strength > 15% vol) cannot be unambiguously determined from the legal note text alone without the full content of additional note 4(B)(b). The `PDOOriginQuality` and `TokajPDOOriginQuality` restrictions are applied. The alcohol strength threshold discriminating 22042233 from sibling codes is partially captured by the existing `PDOWineSmallContainerHighAlcohol` class pattern but a dedicated restriction on `TokajWine` for > 15% vol ABV would require a numeric range axiom on `eucn:alcoholByVolumePercent` which is introduced as a decimalRange restriction below. Coverage is partial due to absence of the full additional note 4(B)(b) text.
